title: terpsichore elastica
intro: Terpsichore elastica, also known as the "sensitive plant", is a species of flowering plant in the pea family native to South America. This plant is known for its unique ability to fold up its leaves when touched or disturbed. The medicinal properties of Terpsichore elastica include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of the plant include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts.
